value.found_quote: Managed Agents API on Agent Platform (Managed code): A config-driven, REST-first API for building autonomous agents inside a fully managed sandbox environment for actions.
value.rationale: The page describes the Managed Agents API on Agent Platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents, matching the claim's intro text verbatim ("Build, deploy, and manage AI agents that use reasoning and tools to perform complex enterprise tasks, such as automating workflows, discovering information across multiple sys..."). The page header notes "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'," indicating preview status.
